message:
fix(ast,wal): escape single quotes in time-travel timestamp display and fix wal_fec formatting

display.rs: Escape embedded single quotes in TimeTravelTarget::Timestamp
display output using SQL-standard '' doubling, preventing syntax errors
when the timestamp string itself contains apostrophes.

wal_fec.rs: Reformat r_repair usize conversion error mapping to satisfy
rustfmt line-length constraints (no logic change).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
